issue_title: Content text under disabled reference fields is dark under dark mode
issue_body_preview: Hi there! Found a minor issue. If we disable a reference field in dark mode, any content text within that field also appears dark making it almost not visible in dark mode. A fix could be to create a custom field but I think this should be something automatically dealt with.
test_description_zh: 在深色模式下，创建或打开一个包含被禁用（disabled）引用字段（reference field）的表单页面，观察该禁用引用字段内的文本内容颜色是否清晰可读。
expected_result_zh: 在深色模式下，被禁用的引用字段中的文本内容应使用浅色/亮色字体，与深色背景形成良好对比，文本清晰可见、易于阅读，不应出现深色文字在深色背景上几乎不可见的情况。
